title.rendered: How To Create A Meaningful Brand Identity

content.rendered: Is your brand identity more than your logo and tagline? In this episode of “In the Now”, David Reske of Nowspeed interviews Dan Stokes of JStokes Agency, who argues that strategy and creative need to come together in order to build an effective brand. Only by starting with your “why” and what makes you unique, can you create the brand messaging and graphics that are meaningful, emotional, and memorable for your identity. Dan has decades of experience helping companies think through their brand essence to make it come alive. Listen to Dan’s Interview now!
